MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-17-2024 IN 206 -- APPEARANCES BY MICAH YOSPE, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT RAVEN LECLAIR-BONACHICH (COUNSEL INDICATED HE'S ALSO SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL); FRANK KIM, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS JUNE BONACICH AND JOSELLE MONARCHI -- DEFENDANT RAVEN LECLAIR-BONACHICH'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 5/13/24 IS CONTINUED TO 3/17/25 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ALL DISCOVERY AND PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES SHALL CORRESPOND TO THE NEW TRIAL DATE, AS REFLECTED ON THE ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. THERE SHALL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES OF THE TRIAL DATE ABSENT GOOD CAUSE. ALL PARTIES MUST EMAIL ADRCOORDINATOR@SFTC.ORG NO LATER THAN SIX WEEKS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE TO SET A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
